topic: writing a regmap-based PMIC regulator driver
q: 写个挂 I2C 的 PMIC regulator 驱动,把若干路输出暴露成 regulator 怎么搭?

corruptions.why: 编造的注册函数,真名 devm_regulator_register

rubric: 填 regulator_desc(name/id/type/ops/n_voltages/寄存器字段)和 regulator_config(dev/regmap/init_data),devm_regulator_register 注册;ops 用 regulator_ops
